holdings.infoBox: PHDG is an equity ETF with a total of 511 individual holdings. The top holdings are Invesco Premier U.S. Government Money Portfolio Institutional Class stock at 16.17%, E-mini S&P 500 Future June 26 at 11.30%, Cboe Vix Future Jul26 at 6.63%, Cash at 6.18%, and NVIDIA at 4.83%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Downside Hedged ETF (PHDG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed ETF that allocates its portfolio between S&P 500 equities, VIX Index futures and cash. PHDG was launched on Dec 6, 2012 and is issued by Invesco.
